config.name: aws_route53-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: aws_route53-latest
-- OCSF Class: DNS Activity (4003)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:13:39.303844

-- Pre-compile patterns for better performance
local patterns = {
    response_code = {
        noerror = "^NOERROR$",
        error = "^(NXDOMAIN|SERVFAIL|REFUSED|TIMEOUT)$"
    }
}

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with local variables
    local output = {
        -- Core OCSF fields
        class_uid = 4003,
        class_name = "DNS Activity", 
        category_uid = 4,
        category_name = "Network Activity",
        type_uid = 400306,
        activity_id = 6,
        activity_name = "Traffic",
        severity_id = 1,

        -- Initialize nested structures
        query = {},
        src_endpoint = {},
        dst_endpoint = {},
        observables = {}
    }

    -- Timestamp handling with validation
    if record.timestamp then
        output.time = record.timestamp
    else
        output.time = os.time() * 1000
    end

    -- Query information
    if record.query_name then
        output.query.hostname = record.query_name:match('^"?(.-)"?$') -- Strip quotes if present
    end
    
    if record.query_type then
        output.query.type = record.query_type:match('^"?(.-)"?$')
    end

    -- Source endpoint information
    if record.client_ip then
        output.src_endpoint.ip = record.client_ip:match('^"?(.-)"?$')
    end
    
    if record.edge_location then
        output.src_endpoint.location = {
            desc = record.edge_location:match('^"?(.-)"?$')
        }
    end

    -- Response code handling with status mapping
    if record.response_code then
        local rcode = record.response_code:match('^"?(.-)"?$')
        output.rcode = rcode
        
        -- Map response code to status_id
        if rcode:match(patterns.response_code.noerror) then
            output.status_id = 1
        elseif rcode:match(patterns.response_code.error) then
            output.status_id = 2
        end
    end

    -- Resolver endpoint handling
    if record.resolver_id then
        output.dst_endpoint.uid = record.resolver_id:match('^"?(.-)"?$')
    end

    -- Build observables array
    if record.client_ip and record.query_name then
        output.observables = {
            {
                name = "client_ip",
                type = "IP Address", 
                value = record.client_ip:match('^"?(.-)"?$')
            },
            {
                name = "query_hostname",
                type = "Hostname",
                value = record.query_name:match('^"?(.-)"?$')
            }
        }
    end

    -- Data source attributes
    output.dataSource = {
        vendor = "AWS",
        name = "AWS Route 53",
        category = "network",
        technology = "dns",
        app = "AWS Route 53 DNS"
    }

    -- Final validation
    if not output.query.hostname then
        return nil, "Missing required field: query hostname"
    end

    return output
end
